scripts.bench: bun run bench:retrieval && bun run bench:core && bun run bench:systems
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run typecheck:tests && bun test tests
scripts.test:context: bun test tests/context-evals tests/context-ledger.test.ts tests/policy-tools.test.ts tests/context-object-store.test.ts tests/structured-compaction.test.ts tests/repo-retrieval-budget.test.ts tests/retrieval-utilization.test.ts tests/bounded-tool-pipeline.test.ts tests/bounded-tool-pipeline-extension.test.ts
